The [[Ubrikkian Transports/Legends|Ubrikkian Transports]] '''SuperHaul''' model was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] skiff designed for cargo hauling. It had a bow-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]].

One such skiff was stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltrators]] to transport stolen [[Starship/Legends|starship]] spare parts from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Nonessential Equipment Storage and Disposal Facility 456]] to a designated pick-up point.
